_title: CRL4^CRBN E3-machinery tissue expression (degrader-completeness, ledger E6)
_note: A CRBN PROTAC needs CRBN + DDB1 + CUL4A/B + RBX1 co-expressed in the target cell. All broadly ('detected in all/many') => the machinery is available in soft-tissue/mesenchymal contexts and the degrader premise is grounded. These are housekeeping-class ligase components; a tissue restriction would be the surprise to catch. No EMC line is in HPA, so this is machinery-availability in general tissue, not EMC-specific proof.
verdict: CRBN machinery broadly expressed — degrader premise grounded
